sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n63171" key="liqodikte/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">λῐθο-δικτέω</orth>, (fort. -<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">δικέω</foreign>) <sense id="n63171.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">throw stones at</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Suid.</author> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
